title: Mayth Duvel
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Mayth Duvel |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I have a petition from the Nezriti Organization. They wish an alliance with Black Sun.''"
"''I'm sure they do.|Mayth Duvel and Prince Xizor|}} '''Mayth Duvel''' was a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Sublieutenant/Legends|sublieutenant]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was among the few loyal underlings of [[Dark Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], [[Underlord]] of Black Sun, who could claim the privilege to visit Xizor within his [[Xizor's Palace|personal sanctum]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Duvel met with Xizor in [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]] while bearing a petition on behalf of the criminal [[Nezriti Organization]], which requested an alliance with Black Sun. ==Biography== {{Quote|They offer a token of their esteem.''"
"''Tell them we'll consider it.|Mayth Duvel presents a Tumanian pressure-ruby to Prince Xizor|}} Mayth Duvel was a [[Sublieutenant/Legends|sublieutenant]] in the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A loyal underling of Black Sun's [[Underlord|leader]], [[Dark Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]—or as loyal as fear could make him—Duvel numbered among the select few of Xizor's minions who had the right to visit the Dark [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] within his [[Xizor's Palace|personal sanctum]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]. some [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Duvel entered Xizor's sanctum with a petition from the [[Nezriti Organization]]. Bowing low before his master, Duvel explained that the rival criminal group sought an alliance with Black Sun and presented Xizor with a small package, which contained a [[Color/Legends|bloodred]] [[Tumanian pressure-ruby]]. By gifting the rare [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstone]], which easily cost several million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], the Nezriti hoped to curry Xizor's favor, but the Dark Prince merely tossed the token onto his desk, unconcerned if it were to later fall in with the garbage. Xizor then dismissed Duvel, instructing him to inform the Nezriti that Black Sun would consider their offer. ==Behind the scenes== Mayth Duvel first appeared in the [[1996]] novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], written by [[Steve Perry]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mayt Duvel }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Duvel, Mayth}} [[Category:Black Sun members]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
